one_line_description: AI-powered web scraping service with proxies and an API that extracts structured data from URLs via prompts.
auth_summary: API token obtained from the app Playground, passed via 'x-api-token' header (docs also show 'Authorization: Bearer' and a token query parameter).
access_notes: Self-serve: create a MrScraper account and grab the API key from the Playground at app.mrscraper.com/playground. Free-trial/free-tier specifics are not clearly documented; usage is credit-based.
api_surface_summary: REST API at api.mrscraper.com: prompt-based AI scraping endpoints plus scrapers/extractors and vertical scrapers (e.g., Google), with n8n and similar integrations documented.
agent_notes: Fetched the official quickstart, which confirms REST + x-api-token auth and self-serve key from the Playground. No official or community MrScraper MCP server found (only a third-party Apify actor that uses the mrscraper engine internally). Pricing/free-tier details and full endpoint breadth not fully confirmed.
